ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock index (e.g., EWQ) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock index */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was created */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country or region the index represents */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Primary sector or industry the index focuses on */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock data entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock index */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* The date of the trading day */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock index */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock index during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock index during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock index */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price accounting for any dividends or stock splits */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividends paid on the index for the day */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Stock split coefficient */,
  "real_time_update" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data entry is from a real-time feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES stock_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock data entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES stock_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily summary, trend analysis) */,
  "data_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the data analyzed in the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Username of the person who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock data entry that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES stock_data ("data_id")
)
